content.explanation:
**Will Have — Future Perfect Tense:**

Yeh tense ek aisi future activity batata hai jo ek certain future time se PEHLE complete ho jayegi.

**Structure:**
Subject + **will have** + Past Participle (V3)

🇮🇳 कल शाम तक वह काम खत्म कर चुका होगा।
🇬🇧 By tomorrow evening, he **will have finished** the work.

**Key words: By, By the time, Before, Until**
rules: Sabhi subjects ke saath same: I/He/She/We/They + will have
Negative: Subject + will + not + have + V3
Perfect tense ka main feature = completion BEFORE a future time
content.memoryTrick: **"By + Time = Will Have Done"** — जब भी "तब तक" या "by" आए, Future Perfect समझो।

examples.hindi: अगले साल तक मैं English fluent हो जाऊँगा।
examples.english: By next year, I will have become fluent in English.

examples.hindi: कल तक वह किताब पढ़ चुकी होगी।
examples.english: By tomorrow, she will have read the book.

examples.hindi: जब तुम आओगे, हम खाना खा चुके होंगे।
examples.english: By the time you come, we will have eaten.

examples.hindi: क्या आप तब तक तैयार हो जाएंगे?
examples.english: Will you have been ready by then?

examples.hindi: वह अगले महीने तक 5 projects पूरे कर चुकी होगी।
examples.english: She will have completed 5 projects by next month.

examples.hindi: 2030 तक यह शहर बहुत बदल चुका होगा।
examples.english: By 2030, this city will have changed a lot.

mistakes.why: Will have + Past Participle (gone not went)

mistakes.correct: By tomorrow, he will have finished.

speakingTips: "By the time" wale sentences practice karo
Planning meetings mein use karo: "By Friday, I will have..."
Predictions: "In 10 years, AI will have changed everything"

vocabulary.example: I will have completed the task.
She will have achieved her goal.
He will have graduated by June.
She will have retired by then.
You will have submitted the form.

practice.hindi: अगले साल मेरे पास नई गाड़ी होगी।
practice.english: Next year, I will have a new car.
alternatives: i will have a new car next year.

practice.hindi: 2025 तक उसके पास डिग्री होगी।
practice.english: By 2025, she will have a degree.
alternatives: she will have her degree by 2025.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम्हारे पास कल समय होगा?
practice.english: Will you have time tomorrow?
alternatives: will you be free tomorrow?
practice.hint: Will you have + noun + time expression?

practice.hindi: वे जल्द ही अपना खुद का घर ले लेंगे।
practice.english: They will soon have their own house.
alternatives: they will have their own home soon.

practice.hindi: अगले महीने हमारे पास नया ऑफिस होगा।
practice.english: We will have a new office next month.
alternatives: next month we will have a new office.

practice.hindi: जब तुम बड़े होगे, तुम्हारे पास ज़्यादा ज़िम्मेदारियाँ होंगी।
practice.english: When you grow up, you will have more responsibilities.
alternatives: you will have more responsibilities when you grow up.
practice.hint: When + clause + will have + more + noun

practice.hindi: क्या वह अगले साल शादी कर चुकी होगी?
practice.english: Will she have got married by next year?
alternatives: will she be married by next year?

practice.hindi: 2030 तक भारत बहुत विकसित होगा।
practice.english: By 2030, India will have developed a lot.
alternatives: india will have advanced a lot by 2030.

practice.hindi: कल शाम तक वह काम खत्म कर चुका होगा।
practice.english: By tomorrow evening, he will have finished the work.
alternatives: he will have completed the work by tomorrow evening.

practice.hindi: तुम एक साल में fluent English बोल पाओगे।
practice.english: You will have fluent English in one year.
alternatives: in one year, you will be fluent in english.

practice.hindi: तब तक वह बहुत अनुभव ले चुका होगा।
practice.english: By then, he will have gained a lot of experience.
alternatives: by that time, he will have a lot of experience.
practice.hint: By then + will have + gained + noun

practice.hindi: अगले 5 साल में उसके पास खुद का व्यवसाय होगा।
practice.english: In the next 5 years, he will have his own business.
alternatives: he will have his own business in 5 years.
practice.hint: In + time + will have + own + noun

practice.hindi: तुमने तब तक 1000 शब्द सीख लिए होंगे।
practice.english: By then, you will have learned 1000 words.
alternatives: you will have learnt 1000 words by then.

practice.hindi: क्या शाम तक वह आ चुका होगा?
practice.english: Will he have arrived by evening?
alternatives: will he have come by evening?

practice.hindi: इस कोर्स को पूरा करके तुम्हें नौकरी मिल जाएगी।
practice.english: After completing this course, you will have a job.
alternatives: you will get a job after completing this course.

practice.hindi: रात तक वह खाना बना चुकी होगी।
practice.english: By night, she will have cooked the food.
alternatives: she will have prepared the food by night.

practice.hindi: जब तक तुम पहुँचोगे, वे जा चुके होंगे।
practice.english: By the time you arrive, they will have left.
alternatives: they will have gone by the time you reach.
practice.hint: By the time + clause + will have + left

practice.hindi: इस साल के अंत तक वह पदोन्नति पा चुकी होगी।
practice.english: By the end of this year, she will have been promoted.
alternatives: she will have gotten a promotion by year end.
practice.hint: By the end of + time + will have been + promoted

practice.hindi: अगले जन्मदिन तक मैं 25 का हो जाऊँगा।
practice.english: By my next birthday, I will have turned 25.
alternatives: i will be 25 by my next birthday.

practice.hindi: क्या तुमने तब तक यह किताब पढ़ ली होगी?
practice.english: Will you have read this book by then?
alternatives: will you have finished this book by then?

practice.hindi: वे अगले महीने तक सब तय कर चुके होंगे।
practice.english: They will have decided everything by next month.
alternatives: by next month, they will have decided everything.

practice.hindi: 10 साल बाद यह शहर बिल्कुल बदल चुका होगा।
practice.english: In 10 years, this city will have changed completely.
alternatives: this city will have completely changed in 10 years.

practice.hindi: तुमने कोर्स खत्म करके एक सर्टिफिकेट पाया होगा।
practice.english: You will have earned a certificate after finishing the course.
alternatives: you will have received a certificate after completing the course.

practice.hindi: क्या वह तब तक काफी पैसे बचा चुका होगा?
practice.english: Will he have saved enough money by then?
alternatives: will he have saved sufficient money by then?

practice.hindi: 2040 तक AI सब कुछ बदल चुकी होगी।
practice.english: By 2040, AI will have changed everything.
alternatives: ai will have transformed everything by 2040.
practice.hint: By + year + will have + changed + everything

practice.hindi: जब तक मैं उठूँगा, वह जा चुका होगा।
practice.english: By the time I wake up, he will have left.
alternatives: he will have gone by the time i wake up.
practice.hint: By the time + present tense + will have + left

practice.hindi: इस परियोजना के खत्म होने तक हम थक चुके होंगे।
practice.english: By the end of this project, we will have been exhausted.
alternatives: we will have gotten tired by the end of this project.
practice.hint: By the end of + noun + will have + been + adjective

practice.hindi: वह कल रात तक 5 किताबें पढ़ चुकी होगी।
practice.english: By tomorrow night, she will have read 5 books.
alternatives: she will have finished 5 books by tomorrow night.
practice.hint: By + time + will have + read + number + noun

practice.hindi: क्या अगले सप्ताह तक आपकी मरम्मत हो चुकी होगी?
practice.english: Will the repairs have been done by next week?
alternatives: will the repair work be completed by next week?

practice.hindi: दिसंबर तक वे दो प्रोजेक्ट पूरे कर चुके होंगे।
practice.english: By December, they will have completed two projects.
alternatives: they will have finished two projects by december.
practice.hint: By + month + will have + completed + number + noun

practice.hindi: अगले हफ्ते तक मैं यह किताब खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा।
practice.english: By next week, I will have finished this book.
alternatives: i will have completed this book by next week.
practice.hint: By + time + will have + finished + noun

practice.hindi: क्या तब तक तुमने खाना बना लिया होगा?
practice.english: Will you have cooked the food by then?
alternatives: will you have prepared the meal by then?

practice.hindi: शाम तक बारिश रुक चुकी होगी।
practice.english: The rain will have stopped by evening.
alternatives: it will have stopped raining by evening.

practice.hindi: अगले सत्र तक वह परीक्षा पास कर चुका होगा।
practice.english: He will have passed the exam by next session.
alternatives: he will have cleared the exam by the next session.

practice.hindi: 2027 तक यह कंपनी बहुत बड़ी हो चुकी होगी।
practice.english: By 2027, this company will have grown a lot.
alternatives: this company will have expanded a lot by 2027.

practice.hindi: क्या हम तब तक घर पहुँच चुके होंगे?
practice.english: Will we have reached home by then?
alternatives: will we have arrived home by then?

practice.hindi: अगले महीने तक वेतन बढ़ चुका होगा।
practice.english: By next month, the salary will have increased.
alternatives: the salary will have gone up by next month.

practice.hindi: इस सप्ताह के अंत तक हम फैसला ले चुके होंगे।
practice.english: By the end of this week, we will have made a decision.
alternatives: we will have decided by the end of this week.
practice.hint: By the end of + time + will have + made + decision

practice.hindi: क्या तुमने अगली सुबह तक जवाब दे दिया होगा?
practice.english: Will you have replied by next morning?
alternatives: will you have responded by tomorrow morning?

practice.hindi: साल के अंत तक हम अपना लक्ष्य पूरा कर चुके होंगे।
practice.english: By the end of the year, we will have achieved our goal.
alternatives: we will have reached our goal by year end.
practice.hint: By the end of + time + will have + achieved + noun
